M1500_SYMTM_HRT_FAILR_PTNTS M1500 Symptoms in Heart Failure Patients This field indicates, if the patient has been diagnosed with heart failure, did the patient exhibit symptoms indicated by clinical heart failure guidelines at any point since the previous OASIS assessment. 00 = No
01 = Yes
02 = Not assessed
NA = Patient does not have diagnosis of heart failure. CHAR 2 x x x
